title: indicator config router ownership / registration-retirement decision

ownership_decision.reason: The router is not part of the current runtime/OpenAPI contract. Registering it would introduce API surface; retiring it would be source-affecting and needs a separate route/source retirement package. For the service lifecycle provider queue, it should be excluded as dormant route code.
ownership_decision.route_governance_handling: may be reopened only by a dedicated route registration or route retirement decision package

test_inventory.finding: contains fixture-based endpoint expectation tests for /configs, but does not prove FastAPI registration
domain IndicatorConfig validation; not a route registration proof
indicator registry and metadata tests; not a create_indicator_config router proof

next_gate.title: service lifecycle residual candidate refresh after dormant indicator-config exclusion
next_gate.purpose: refresh the active provider candidate queue after classifying create_indicator_config.py as dormant and excluded from active implementation candidacy
